name: krutagidon-simulation-codex
description: Headless deterministic simulation engine scaffold for Krutagidon 2.

scripts.simulate: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/src/cli/run-simulation-menu.js
scripts.simulate:mass: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/src/cli/run-mass-simulation.js
scripts.simulate:single: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/src/cli/run-single-game.js
scripts.generate:drafts: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/src/cli/generate-drafts.js
scripts.validate:drafts: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/src/cli/validate-drafts.js
scripts.test: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/tests/run-tests.js
